summary: EXP-268 P3 patch (NN-tour replacement) added to §4.2.7a. Replaces the start-point-dependent '16,439 km > 15,660 km' claim and the unsourced 442-km band-width number with: (a) robust 12,000-km tour lower bound, (b) explicit comparison to the 4,500-km mid-disc-velocity arc (~3× the tour), (c) 10^-27 chance-coincidence probability framing. Area-coverage argument is now load-bearing; NN tour observation is supporting.
notes: Close after EXP-268 integrates into data/sections.json. The three text_patches in EXP-268 are additive footnotes; verified each {find} anchor is uniquely matched in current sections.json. Net section delta ~2,678 chars (~+170 words). All 13 <details> tags remain balanced after patch application. ‎
